text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The angular perspectives and clean, modern architecture stimulate my mind to question the purpose of this space. Moving into the vibrant R+D area, I am energized by the creative environment, surrounded by colors, patterns, and the hum of innovation. There is a feeling of openness to new ideas, yet also a hint of disorientation from the slightly off-kilter views. It feels as though I am on the threshold of discovery, eager to learn what this place has to show me.
